channel.title: Cristian Taraborrelli Studio — Productions
channel.description: Opera, theatre, ceremonies, events. Three decades of stage and creative direction by Cristian Taraborrelli.

item.title: Pagliacci — AR Breaks into Opera
item.description: The world's first opera production with real-time 3D augmented reality. Pagliacci by Ruggero Leoncavallo at Teatro Carlo Felice, Genoa, 2021. Direction, set and lighting by Cristian Taraborrelli; costumes by Angela Buscemi; conductor Andriy Yurkevych. Broadcast by Rai 5 and available on RaiPlay. Documented in The Scenographer — Theatrical Notebooks (SCSA London, September 2022).

item.title: La Pietra del Paragone
item.description: Rossini's youthful comic masterpiece. Teatro Regio di Parma 2006, Théâtre du Châtelet Paris 2007 (Premio Franco Abbiati 2007) and 2014 revival. Direction by Giorgio Barberio Corsetti and Pierrick Sorin, conductor Jean-Christophe Spinosi with Ensemble Matheus. Costumes by Cristian Taraborrelli and Angela Buscemi; maquette supervision and 3D-printed set details by Cristian Taraborrelli.

item.title: La Belle Hélène
item.description: Offenbach's operetta at Théâtre du Châtelet, Paris 2015. Costume design by Cristian Taraborrelli (Golden Prague Awards Special Mention 2015).

item.title: Macbeth
item.description: Verdi's opera at Teatro alla Scala di Milano, 2013. Costume design and video by Cristian Taraborrelli, on figurines by Angela Buscemi.

item.title: La Jura
item.description: Gavino Gabriel's rediscovered Sardinian opera at Teatro Lirico di Cagliari, 2015. Direction, set and costume design by Cristian Taraborrelli — first reconstruction of the 1928 Cagliari premiere.

item.title: Il Processo di Kafka — Premio Ubu 1999
item.description: Direction by Giorgio Barberio Corsetti; set and costume design by Cristian Taraborrelli. Premio Ubu 1999.

item.title: Gertrude (Le Cri)
item.description: Howard Barker. Direction by Giorgio Barberio Corsetti; set design by Cristian Taraborrelli. Prix du Syndicat de la Critique 2009 for best scenography. Nominated for Molière Awards.

item.title: Italian Souvenir — Milano Cortina 2026 Ceremonies
item.description: Content supervision and creative role for the Paralympic ceremonies of Milano Cortina 2026.
